title: message_set: no space-membership check before posting to channel chat
description: In daemon/src/jmap.rs message_set create path (around line 1942), the code calls get_chats() to verify the chat exists, then inserts the message. For a channel chat (kind='channel', space_id set), there is no check that account_id is a member of space_member for that space. Any authenticated JMAP user who knows a channel's chat_id can post messages to it, bypassing space access control entirely. Fix: after get_chats() succeeds, if the returned ChatRow.kind == 'channel' and ChatRow.space_id is Some, verify account_id has a space_member row for that space_id before proceeding.
